narration: Science has a clearer story about context dependent memory than social media does.

narration: Imagine walking into a room and suddenly remembering something from last week. That’s context dependent memory at work.

narration: It means our memories are tied to the environment we’re in. Change the setting, and you may forget!
visual_description: Escalation visual: It means our memories are tied to the environment we’re in. Change the setting, and you may forget!

ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: It means our memories are tied to the environment we’re in. Change the setting, and you may forget!

narration: Studies show that people recall information better in the same context where they learned it.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Studies show that people recall information better in the same context where they learned it.

ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Studies show that people recall information better in the same context where they learned it.

narration: So, if you study in a coffee shop, try testing in one. You might be amazed at your results!
